FENANIR Samir

Bureau:

Samir FENANIR has obtained Engineering degree in Computer Sciences
from Sétif University in 2000 and the Magister degree from Sétif University in
2008. He is actually an Assistant Professor at computer science department of
Ferhat Abbas Sétif 1 University in Algeria. His research interests are in the
area of Machine Learning, Wireless sensor networks and IoT Security.
